backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor that combines authorization, blob storage, user profiles, and content (poetry, dua, songs) CRUD with admin-only creation, like tracking, user management, and maintenance mode.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing two requirements for the UsersControlsPanel component: correctly fetching and rendering all registered users in a table, and adding a client-side search/filter input by Unique ID.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of each component and page.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining light and dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system including colors, borders, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Dard-e-munasif' with a favicon and a root div that loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for login, home, poetry, dua, songs, and admin pages, wrapped in a ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/ContentMan: Admin panel component that lists all poetry, duas, and songs with per-item delete functionality, confirmation dialogs, and query cache invalidation on deletion.
frontend/src/components/admin/DuaUploadF: Admin form for uploading a new Dua with title, content, and optional audio file, showing upload progress and resetting on success.
frontend/src/components/admin/PoetryUplo: Admin form for uploading new poetry with title, content, and an optional image file, tracking upload progress via ExternalBlob.
frontend/src/components/admin/SongUpload: Admin form for uploading a song with title, artist, and a required audio file, using explicit MIME type accept values to avoid mobile voice recorder prompts.
frontend/src/components/admin/UsersContr: Admin panel component that provides a maintenance mode toggle and a searchable users table with block/unblock actions, using React Query mutations and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/AudioPlayer.tsx: Standalone audio player component with play/pause, seek slider, AudioContext focus management, enforced unmuted full volume, MediaSession integration, and a permission-denied guard UI.
frontend/src/components/BanScreen.tsx: Full-screen overlay component displayed when a user's account is suspended, showing a ShieldX icon and a suspension message.
frontend/src/components/DuaPost.tsx: Renders a card for a single Dua post with title, content, like count, and a download button that saves audio to IndexedDB and triggers a browser download. Clicking the card opens a FullScreenPostModal.
frontend/src/components/FullScreenPostMo: Full-screen modal overlay for displaying a Poetry or Dua post with title, image (if poetry), content, audio player (if dua), and like count. Tracks view history and locks background scroll while open.
frontend/src/components/HamburgerMenu.ts: Slide-out hamburger menu panel showing collapsible History and Downloads sections, with playback controls for downloaded audio and delete functionality for individual downloads.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that handles authentication redirects, checks user ban status and maintenance mode, and renders the sticky header with navigation links, theme toggle, and hamburger menu around page children.
frontend/src/components/MaintenanceScree: Full-screen maintenance notice overlay with an animated wrench icon and bouncing dots, displayed when the app is in maintenance mode.
Full-screen music player modal that auto-plays the selected song, displays album art, a seek slider, play/pause controls, and elapsed/total time using the useAudioPlayback hook.
frontend/src/components/PINAuthGuard.tsx: Wraps children behind a PIN entry form, storing authentication state in sessionStorage so the admin panel is only accessible after entering the correct hardcoded PIN.
frontend/src/components/PoetryPost.tsx: Renders a poetry card with title, optional image, content preview, like count, and a download button; clicking the card opens a full-screen modal.
frontend/src/components/SongPost.tsx: Renders a song card with inline play/pause controls using a shared audio playback hook, and opens a full NowPlayingModal on card click.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) via React Query, reinitializing dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioPlayback.ts: Custom hook managing global singleton audio playback with shared state, wake lock, MediaSession metadata, buffer checking, and permission handling for a single active track.
frontend/src/hooks/useDownloads.ts: Custom hook that manages offline audio downloads stored in IndexedDB, exposing add, delete, play, and refresh operations with local state synchronization.
frontend/src/hooks/useHistory.ts: Custom hook that tracks playback history entries in IndexedDB, providing addHistoryEntry and refreshHistory utilities with automatic timestamping.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for ICP authentication via AuthClient, exposing identity, login/clear functions, and login status states.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for CRUD operations on Poetry, Dua, Songs, and user management (register, block, unblock, maintenance mode) against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebAudioFilters.ts: Stub hook retained for import compatibility; the Web Audio filter chain is fully bypassed and all methods are no-ops, with audio playing directly via HTMLAudioElement.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts (Urdu, Devanagari, Inter), sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, and adds utility classes for Urdu text and fade-in animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: PIN-protected admin panel page with tabbed navigation for uploading poetry/dua/songs, managing existing content, and controlling users via dedicated sub-components.
frontend/src/pages/DuaPage.tsx: Page that fetches and displays all duas in a responsive grid using DuaPost components, with loading skeletons, error alerts with retry, and an empty-state message.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Two-step login page where users enter their name then select a server; generates a stable device fingerprint, registers the user via a mutation, and stores credentials in localStorage before navigating home.
frontend/src/pages/MixPage.tsx: Home/mix feed page that fetches all poetry, duas, and songs, merges them by like count into a unified sorted feed, and displays a user identity card with a copyable unique code alongside mixed content posts.
frontend/src/pages/PoetryPage.tsx: Page that fetches and displays all poetry items in a responsive grid using PoetryPost components, with loading skeletons, error handling with retry, and an empty-state fallback.
frontend/src/pages/SongsPage.tsx: Page that fetches and displays all songs in a responsive grid using SongPost components, with loading skeletons, error alerts with retry, and an empty-state message.
frontend/src/utils/indexedDB.ts: Provides IndexedDB initialization and CRUD utilities for two stores: 'history' (browsing history metadata, capped at 50 entries) and 'downloads' (audio Blobs with metadata). Exports typed interfaces and helper functions for adding, retrieving, and deleting entries.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading URL query parameters from both standard query strings and hash-based routes, with helpers to persist values in sessionStorage and clean sensitive params from the URL bar without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH-based design tokens, custom font families (Inter and Noto Nastaliq Urdu), accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document (version 41) tracking the 'Dard-e-munasif' multimedia app rebuild, listing architectural decisions, known bugs (failed content loads, delete auth errors, Android audio issues), and the full inventory of existing features.
